build.detail: bun run build completed with 0 errors. 8 pre-existing react-hooks/exhaustive-deps warnings in other blocks (Accordion, Archive, ContentWithMedia, FullWidthMedia, PostHero, Tabs) — none in Footer.

lint.detail: 0 lint errors in Footer block files.

registration.detail: block.json valid: apiVersion 3, name takt/footer, all file references exist, child block directories valid, attribute types correct.

testPageGate.detail: 6 instances of takt/footer found on test-footer page, all inside takt/demo-container wrappers.

specCompliance.detail: Planning spec called for 5 file changes: 3 SVGs updated, FooterInfoSocial.tsx updated (flex-wrap), FooterInfoSocial.php updated (flex-wrap). All 5 verified in source files and rendered output.

verifications.expected: Horizontal filled rectangle (16x4) centered in 24x24 viewBox
Three 6x6 filled squares arranged horizontally with 1px gaps
verifications.actual: Three <rect> elements at x=2, x=9, x=16, each 6x6 at y=9

verifications.expected: Single filled square centered in viewBox

class='flex flex-wrap gap-3 items-center' on line 14

tsxPhpSync.detail: taktician_validate_all sync check passed. No $attributes extraction anti-pattern. Docblock present. Attribute usage consistent. The reported htmlStructureSync warning (FooterInfo.tsx uses <inspectorcontrols> as root vs PHP uses <section>) is a known false-positive: the editor wrapper uses InspectorControls for sidebar panels, while the PHP renders the actual section — this is expected and correct for dynamic blocks.

syncWarning.message: Root wrapper element mismatch: TSX uses <inspectorcontrols>, PHP uses <section>
syncWarning.assessment: Expected false-positive — InspectorControls is an editor-only sidebar component, not a rendered wrapper. PHP section is the correct frontend output.

flexWrapRendered.detail: Page audit confirmed ul.flex.flex-wrap present in all 7 footer sections on the rendered page. Old pattern (flex without flex-wrap) found in 0 sections.

markupDuplication.detail: No duplicate responsive markup patterns detected.

interactiveBehavior.reason: Footer has no interactive elements (no accordions, carousels, tabs, or modals).

accessibility.detail: nav element with aria-label='Social Media Links' present. All images have alt attributes (logo image alt='' is decorative — acceptable). Heading hierarchy passes. No JS errors. No overflow at any breakpoint.
accessibility.patternComplianceReason: No WAI-ARIA interactive patterns applicable to footer block (no tabs, accordion, carousel, or dialog).

commonRules.LINKS_HREF: note — 66 links use # or empty href; these are test page placeholder links, not a block defect
commonRules.REDUCED_MOTION: pass — no animations in Footer CSS

issues.description: Logo link in footer instances without a logo image renders an empty anchor (href='/' with no visible text or image), which screen readers will still announce as a link. This is visible in footer section 0 and 6 where the logo link has empty text content.
issues.fix: Conditionally hide the logo anchor when no logo is set, or ensure it always has an aria-label when rendered. If the logo link wraps a conditional image, the anchor should only render when the image is present.

passedChecks: Build compiles without errors (0 errors, 0 warnings in Footer block)
